name: icy.tools NFT Analytics API
description: icy.tools provides NFT analytics and market data via a GraphQL API. The API offers access to NFT collection data, trending collections, wallet analytics, and token-level data across Ethereum and other EVM chains. Note: icy.tools was acquired by QuickNode and the API has been migrated. The original developer portal at developers.icy.tools now redirects to QuickNode.
